query: How is the account cross-reference file used?

results.name: DATA DIVISION
results.preamble:
File: CBACT03C.cbl
Program: CBACT03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Read and print account cross reference data file.
Section: DATA DIVISION (lines 35-69)
results.summary: data_division DATA DIVISION in CBACT03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVACT03Y.
results.content:
DATA DIVISION.                                                           
       FILE SECTION.                                                            
       FD  XREFFILE-FILE.                                                       
       01  FD-XREFFILE-REC.                                                     
           05 FD-XREF-CARD-NUM                  PIC X(16).                      
           05 FD-XREF-DATA                      PIC X(34).                      
                                                                                
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.                                                 
                                                                                
      *****************************************************************         
       COPY CVACT03Y.                                                           
       01  XREFFILE-STATUS.                                                     
           05  XREFFILE-STAT1      PIC X.                                       
           05  XREFFILE-STAT2      PIC X.                                       
                                                                                
       01  IO-STATUS.                                                           
           05  IO-STAT1            PIC X.                                       
           05  IO-STAT2            PIC X.                                       
       01  TWO-BYTES-BINARY        PIC 9(4) BINARY.                             
       01  TWO-BYTES-ALPHA         REDEFINES TWO-BYTES-BINARY.                  
           05  TWO-BYTES-LEFT      PIC X.                                       
           05  TWO-BYTES-RIGHT     PIC X.                                       
       01  IO-STATUS-04.                                                        
           05  IO-STATUS-0401      PIC 9   VALUE 0.                             
           05  IO-STATUS-0403      PIC 999 VALUE 0.                             
                                                                                
       01  APPL-RESULT             PIC S9(9)   COMP.                            
           88  APPL-AOK            VALUE 0.                                     
           88  APPL-EOF            VALUE 16.                                    
                                                                                
       01  END-OF-FILE             PIC X(01)    VALUE 'N'.                      
       01  ABCODE                  PIC S9(9) BINARY.                            
       01  TIMING                  PIC S9(9) BINARY.                            
                                                                                
      *****************************************************************

results.name: 9000-XREFFILE-CLOSE
results.preamble:
File: CBACT03C.cbl
Program: CBACT03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Read and print account cross reference data file.
Paragraph: 9000-XREFFILE-CLOSE (lines 136-153)
References: COPY CVACT03Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 9000-XREFFILE-CLOSE in CBACT03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVACT03Y. invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
9000-XREFFILE-CLOSE.                                                     
           ADD 8 TO ZERO GIVING APPL-RESULT.                                    
           CLOSE XREFFILE-FILE                                                  
           IF  XREFFILE-STATUS = '00'                                           
               SUBTRACT APPL-RESULT FROM APPL-RESULT                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               ADD 12 TO ZERO GIVING APPL-RESULT                                
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING XREFFILE'                                 
               MOVE XREFFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.

results.name: 1000-XREFFILE-GET-NEXT
results.preamble:
File: CBACT03C.cbl
Program: CBACT03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Read and print account cross reference data file.
Paragraph: 1000-XREFFILE-GET-NEXT (lines 92-117)
References: COPY CVACT03Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 1000-XREFFILE-GET-NEXT in CBACT03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVACT03Y. invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: I/O ROUTINES TO ACCESS A KSDS, VSAM DATA SET...               *.
results.content:
1000-XREFFILE-GET-NEXT.                                                  
           READ XREFFILE-FILE INTO CARD-XREF-RECORD.                            
           IF  XREFFILE-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
               DISPLAY CARD-XREF-RECORD                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               IF  XREFFILE-STATUS = '10'                                       
                   MOVE 16 TO APPL-RESULT                                       
               ELSE                                                             
                   MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                       
               END-IF                                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               IF  APPL-EOF                                                     
                   MOVE 'Y' TO END-OF-FILE                                      
               ELSE                                                             
                   DISPLAY 'ERROR READING XREFFILE'                             
                   MOVE XREFFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                            
                   PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                               
                   PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                   
               END-IF                                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
results.comments: I/O ROUTINES TO ACCESS A KSDS, VSAM DATA SET...               *

results.name: 0000-XREFFILE-OPEN
results.preamble:
File: CBACT03C.cbl
Program: CBACT03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Read and print account cross reference data file.
Paragraph: 0000-XREFFILE-OPEN (lines 118-135)
References: COPY CVACT03Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 0000-XREFFILE-OPEN in CBACT03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVACT03Y. invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
0000-XREFFILE-OPEN.                                                      
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           OPEN INPUT XREFFILE-FILE                                             
           IF  XREFFILE-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING XREFFILE'                                 
               MOVE XREFFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.content:
9999-ABEND-PROGRAM.                                                      
           DISPLAY 'ABENDING PROGRAM'                                           
           MOVE 0 TO TIMING                                                     
           MOVE 999 TO ABCODE                                                   
           CALL 'CEE3ABD' USING ABCODE, TIMING.

results.name: 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT, 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COACTVWC.cbl
Program: COACTVWC - Business logic - Accept and process Account View request
Paragraph: 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT, 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT-EXIT (lines 723-773)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTVW, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
Calls: PERFORM SEND-LONG-TEXT
results.summary: paragraph 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT, 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT-EXIT in COACTVWC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-LONG-TEXT.
results.content:
9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT.                                                 
                                                                                
      *    Read the Card file. Access via alternate index ACCTID                
      *                                                                         
           EXEC CICS READ                                                       
                DATASET   (LIT-CARDXREFNAME-ACCT-PATH)                          
                RIDFLD    (WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X)                               
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X)                     
                INTO      (CARD-XREF-RECORD)                                    
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF CARD-XREF-RECORD)                          
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)                                          
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)                                          
           END-EXEC                                                             
                                                                                
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD                                                  
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)                                             
                  MOVE XREF-CUST-ID               TO CDEMO-CUST-ID              
                  MOVE XREF-CARD-NUM              TO CDEMO-CARD-NUM             
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)                                             
                  SET INPUT-ERROR                 TO TRUE                       
                  SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK       TO TRUE                       
                  IF WS-RETURN-MSG-OFF                                          
                    MOVE WS-RESP-CD               TO ERROR-RESP                 
                    MOVE WS-REAS-CD               TO ERROR-RESP2                
                    STRING                                                      
                    'Account:'                                                  
                     WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X                                      
                    ' not found in'                                             
                    ' Cross ref file.  Resp:'                                   
                    ERROR-RESP                                                  
                    ' Reas:'                                                    
                    ERROR-RESP2                                                 
                    DELIMITED BY SIZE                                           
                    INTO WS-RETURN-MSG                                          
                    END-STRING                                                  
                  END-IF                                                        
               WHEN OTHER                                                       
                  SET INPUT-ERROR                 TO TRUE                       
                  SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK                TO TRUE              
                  MOVE 'READ'                     TO ERROR-OPNAME               
                  MOVE LIT-CARDXREFNAME-ACCT-PATH TO ERROR-FILE                 
                  MOVE WS-RESP-CD                 TO ERROR-RESP                 
                  MOVE WS-REAS-CD                 TO ERROR-RESP2                
                  MOVE WS-FILE-ERROR-MESSAGE      TO WS-RETURN-MSG              
      *                                              WS-LONG-MSG                
      *          PERFORM SEND-LONG-TEXT                                         
           END-EVALUATE                                                         
           .                                                                    
       9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT-EXIT.                                            
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: READ-CXACAIX-FILE
results.preamble:
File: COBIL00C.cbl
Program: COBIL00C - CICS COBOL Program - Bill Payment - Pay account balance in full and a
Paragraph: READ-CXACAIX-FILE (lines 408-440)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COBIL00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM SEND-BILLPAY-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph READ-CXACAIX-FILE in COBIL00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COBIL00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-BILLPAY-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
READ-CXACAIX-FILE.

           EXEC CICS READ
                DATASET   (WS-CXACAIX-FILE)
                INTO      (CARD-XREF-RECORD)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF CARD-XREF-RECORD)
                RIDFLD    (XREF-ACCT-ID)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF XREF-ACCT-ID)
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                   CONTINUE
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Account ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO ACTIDINL OF COBIL0AI
                   PERFORM SEND-BILLPAY-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup XREF AIX file...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO ACTIDINL OF COBIL0AI
                   PERFORM SEND-BILLPAY-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      STARTBR-TRANSACT-FILE
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
results.preamble:
File: CBACT03C.cbl
Program: CBACT03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Read and print account cross reference data file.
Paragraph: 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS (lines 161-178)
References: COPY CVACT03Y
results.summary: paragraph 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS in CBACT03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVACT03Y.
results.content:
9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS.                                                  
           IF  IO-STATUS NOT NUMERIC                                            
           OR  IO-STAT1 = '9'                                                   
               MOVE IO-STAT1 TO IO-STATUS-04(1:1)                               
               MOVE 0        TO TWO-BYTES-BINARY                                
               MOVE IO-STAT2 TO TWO-BYTES-RIGHT                                 
               MOVE TWO-BYTES-BINARY TO IO-STATUS-0403                          
               DISPLAY 'FILE STATUS IS: NNNN' IO-STATUS-04                      
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE '0000' TO IO-STATUS-04                                      
               MOVE IO-STATUS TO IO-STATUS-04(3:2)                              
               DISPLAY 'FILE STATUS IS: NNNN' IO-STATUS-04                      
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
                                                                                
      *
      * Ver: CardDemo_v2.0-25-gdb72e6b-235 Date: 2025-04-29 11:01:27 CDT
      *

results.name: 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT, 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COACTUPC.cbl
Program: COACTUPC - Business logic - Accept and process ACCOUNT UPDATE
Paragraph: 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT, 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT-EXIT (lines 3650-3700)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY CSLKPCDY, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTUP, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY CSSETATY, COPY CSUTLDPY
Calls: PERFORM SEND-LONG-TEXT
results.summary: paragraph 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT, 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT-EXIT in COACTUPC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, CSLKPCDY, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-LONG-TEXT.
results.content:
9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT.

      *    Read the Card file. Access via alternate index ACCTID
      *
           EXEC CICS READ
                DATASET   (LIT-CARDXREFNAME-ACCT-PATH)
                RIDFLD    (WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X)
                INTO      (CARD-XREF-RECORD)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF CARD-XREF-RECORD)
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                  MOVE XREF-CUST-ID               TO CDEMO-CUST-ID
                  MOVE XREF-CARD-NUM              TO CDEMO-CARD-NUM
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
                  SET INPUT-ERROR                 TO TRUE
                  SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK       TO TRUE
                  IF WS-RETURN-MSG-OFF
                    MOVE WS-RESP-CD               TO ERROR-RESP
                    MOVE WS-REAS-CD               TO ERROR-RESP2
                    STRING
                    'Account:'
                     WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID-X
                    ' not found in'
                    ' Cross ref file.  Resp:'
                    ERROR-RESP
                    ' Reas:'
                    ERROR-RESP2
                    DELIMITED BY SIZE
                    INTO WS-RETURN-MSG
                    END-STRING
                  END-IF
               WHEN OTHER
                  SET INPUT-ERROR                 TO TRUE
                  SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK                TO TRUE
                  MOVE 'READ'                     TO ERROR-OPNAME
                  MOVE LIT-CARDXREFNAME-ACCT-PATH TO ERROR-FILE
                  MOVE WS-RESP-CD                 TO ERROR-RESP
                  MOVE WS-REAS-CD                 TO ERROR-RESP2
                  MOVE WS-FILE-ERROR-MESSAGE      TO WS-RETURN-MSG
      *                                              WS-LONG-MSG
      *          PERFORM SEND-LONG-TEXT
           END-EVALUATE
           .
       9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT-EXIT.
           EXIT
           .
